name: AS-REP Roasting

stages.name: Account enumeration and AS-REP hash request
Authentication attempt via WinRM
stages.result: WinRMAuthorizationError — jdoe not in Remote Management Users

stages.name: ACL abuse path confirmed
stages.result: GenericAll confirmed: CORP\jdoe has GenericAll over jsmith — full privilege escalation path to DCSync

splunk_queries.t1_triage: index=windows EventCode=4768 | search _raw="*Pre-Authentication*0x0*" OR Pre_Authentication_Type=0 | table _time, Account_Name, Client_Address, Pre_Authentication_Type | sort -_time
splunk_queries.t2_timeline: index=windows | search Client_Address="::ffff:10.10.10.99" | table _time, EventCode, Account_Name, Service_Name, Pre_Authentication_Type | sort _time
splunk_queries.t2_auth: index=windows EventCode=4624 | search Account_Name="jdoe" | table _time, Account_Name, src_ip, Logon_Type | sort -_time

visibility_gaps.description: Account enumeration via LDAP/GetNPUsers leaves no Security log entry
visibility_gaps.fix: Honeypot accounts + LDAP audit logging — Sprint 4

visibility_gaps.description: ACL enumeration generates no Security event — GenericAll path invisible
visibility_gaps.fix: Enable advanced AD auditing Object Access — Sprint 4

lessons_learned: Pre-auth disabled = offline-crackable hash with no credentials required for target
EC4768 Pre-Auth=0 is high-fidelity — almost never a false positive
WinRM access not required — impact evaluated via ACL rights and privilege paths
GenericAll jdoe->jsmith->DCSync = full domain compromise from one unprivileged account
Save hashes to ~/corplab/hashes/ not /tmp — survives reboots
